task: Design a microservices authentication system with JWT, OAuth2, and rate limiting

quality_policy.delegation_path: orchestrator -> security_analyst -> backend_api -> database_architect -> devops_engineer -> tech_writer

demo_script:
We can tune what the policy optimizes for.
[show quality policy graph]: quality-optimized, 5 specialists, sequential, 3 minutes.
[show latency policy graph]: latency-balanced, 3 specialists, parallel, 45 seconds.
Same training infrastructure, different reward signal. That's what makes this a product.
